basic_details.job_title: Suri Sadar Hospital – House Staff – 13 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Suri Sadar Hospital Birbhum Recruitment 2026 for 13 posts of House Staff (MBBS). Candidates with MBBS Can attend walkin. The Walk-in on 02-06-2026. For detailed information please visit Suri Sadar Hospital official website birbhum.gov.in.
